name: Furry Sleepover REIM
description:
I know I said i was done with this stuff.

Turns out I'm not, least not yet. As of the 16th of September, I've improved the bot a lot in terms of writing quality and description for ease of use and comprehension. I also plan on adding a lorebook, but i need to figure out what to add to it first.

I also plan on updating the profile picture to accommodate the two new characters (Nolan and Hazel, both based on real people), so give me some time and I'll see if i can do that.

This is the official port of my bot on character.ai, the remastered one. The original one is unavailable for an unknown reason, and frankly obsolete at this point.

Have fun!
creator: Isaac Webb
